notes: Rock-OS uses active as the default dashboard session; local active changes are stored outside Git.
Public shows dashboards but hides Profiles.
Path sessions show one profile workspace subtree, such as Profiles/Kids.
Add future sessions to the sessions list so they appear in the home-page dropdown.

sessions.name: Public
sessions.description: Shows normal dashboard sections, but hides Profiles.

sessions.name: Kids
sessions.description: Shows only the Kids child profile workspace.
